'''chazhaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibutamoren|ibutamoren]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibutamoren|ibutamoren]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chazhaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzhæjæth|chæzhæjæth]] || [[word:chæzhæjæj|chæzhæjæj]] || [[word:chæzhæjæsh|chæzhæjæsh]] || [[word:chæzhæjæ|chæzhæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazhazhajath|chazhazhajath]] || [[word:chazhazhajaj|chazhazhajaj]] || [[word:chazhazhajash|chazhazhajash]] || [[word:chazhazhaja|chazhazhaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazhajath|chazhajath]] || [[word:chazhajaj|chazhajaj]] || [[word:chazhajash|chazhajash]] || [[word:chazhaja|chazhaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazhafjath|chazhafjath]] || [[word:chazhafjaj|chazhafjaj]] || [[word:chazhafjash|chazhafjash]] || [[word:chazhafjaf|chazhafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazhajatha|chazhajatha]] || [[word:chazhajaja|chazhajaja]] || [[word:chazhajasha|chazhajasha]] || [[word:chazhajaka|chazhajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazhajath|chazhajath]] || [[word:chazhajaj|chazhajaj]] || [[word:chazhajash|chazhajash]] || [[word:chazhaja|chazhaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazhajathal|chazhajathal]] || [[word:chazhajajal|chazhajajal]] || [[word:chazhajashal|chazhajashal]] || [[word:chazhajakal|chazhajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazhajathatha|chazhajathatha]] || [[word:chazhajajaja|chazhajajaja]] || [[word:chazhajashasha|chazhajashasha]] || [[word:chazhajaka|chazhajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazhajathan|chazhajathan]] || [[word:chazhajajan|chazhajajan]] || [[word:chazhajashan|chazhajashan]] || [[word:chazhajakan|chazhajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazhajathaoro|chazhajathaoro]] || [[word:chazhajajaoro|chazhajajaoro]] || [[word:chazhajashaoro|chazhajashaoro]] || [[word:chazhajakaoro|chazhajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
